title: post api v1 auth login with valid credentials
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid user credentials returns HTTP 200 with a JWT access token and user session details.

title: get api v1 users with admin token
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/users with a valid admin JWT token returns HTTP 200 with a paginated list of users.

title: get api v1 courses with authenticated token
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/courses with a valid authenticated token returns HTTP 200 with the list of accessible courses.

title: post api v1 applications with valid data
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/applications with valid application data returns HTTP 201 Created with application status pending review.

title: get api v1 assignments with authenticated token
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/assignments with a valid authenticated token returns HTTP 200 with the list of assignments for the user.
